title: Add Icon column

posts.author: RoseZ (rose.zandvliet@talpanetwork.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would it not be great to add a column that shows icons, for instance social icons. So when you use Monday for contentplanning, you can see in one overview on which platforms you’re gonna post.

But can also use it to show icons that represent processes or domains (sports, leasure, travel) etc.

Acceptance criteria:

  • be able to choose form a standard set of icons
  • be able to add/upload your own icons
  • set how many icons the column may display
  • connect icons to automations [e.g. when adding airplane icon, also show in travel board]
  • be able to show this on calendar view, and then ALSO be able to connect a specific color to each icon, to distinguise in calendar view.
